2026-04-24T23:14:26.9632009Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/azure-sdk-for-js/azure-sdk-for-js
2026-04-24T23:14:26.9662782Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-04-24T23:14:26.9668871Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-04-24T23:14:26.9727456Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-04-24T23:14:27.0018778Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-04-24T23:14:27.0024595Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-24T23:14:27.0060473Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-24T23:14:27.0349645Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-04-24T23:14:27.0357502Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-24T23:14:27.0391909Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
